attacking_style: Insufficient data to establish clear attacking pattern. Limited observations show presence in sprint finales rather than proactive attacking.
team_tactics: Minimal team tactical data available. Appears to operate without strong leadout support in compressed finales.
terrain_preference: Struggles on technical TT courses requiring sustained diesel-engine pacing. Power profile suggests suitability for explosive finishes over time trial efforts.
vulnerability: Tactical positioning in compressed sprint finales - lacks race craft to convert finishing speed into victories. Technical time trial courses expose limitations as non-TT specialist.
key_patterns: Tactical positioning errors in decisive moments cost results despite having requisite physical qualities.
Loses disproportionate time in technical time trials compared to pure power specialists.
form_trajectory: neutral: Shows physical capability (finishing speed) but tactical execution remains underdeveloped, limiting conversion of form into results
